---
name: 💡 Feature Request
about: Suggest an idea for SecureWipe
title: "[FEATURE] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''

---

## 💡 Feature Description
A clear and concise description of what the feature should do.

## 🎯 Use Case
Describe the use case and how this feature would be beneficial. Why do you need it?

## 📋 Example
If applicable, provide an example of how the feature would work:
```
User does X
Application does Y
Result: Z
```

## 🔗 Related Features
Is this related to any existing features or other requests?

## 📚 Additional Context
Add any other context or suggestions here.

## 🏆 Alternatives Considered
Describe alternative solutions or approaches you've considered.

## ☑️ Checklist
- [ ] Feature is clearly described
- [ ] Use case is explained
- [ ] No duplicate feature requests exist
- [ ] Feature aligns with project goals
